title: How do I open a PPTX file in the app?
content: You can open PPTX files directly from the app, your file manager, downloads folder, email attachments, or any app that supports file sharing.

title: Can I open password-protected PPTX files?
content: Yes, the app supports opening password-protected PPTX files. Simply enter the correct password when prompted.

title: Does the app remember my last reading position?
content: Yes, the app automatically remembers your last page, zoom level, and reading progress so you can continue where you left off.

title: Can I search text inside a PPTX?
content: Yes, you can search for any word or phrase inside a PPTX. The app highlights matches and allows quick navigation between results.

title: Does the app support scanned PPTXs?
content: Yes, scanned or image-based PPTXs are supported. OCR is used to detect text for features like read aloud.

title: What is read aloud mode?
content: Read aloud mode converts PPTX text into speech, allowing you to listen to documents with playback controls like play, pause, next, and previous.

title: Can I customize the voice in read aloud mode?
content: Yes, you can adjust speech rate, pitch, and choose different voices for a personalized listening experience.

title: How do bookmarks work?
content: You can bookmark any page and quickly access it later. Bookmarks also show thumbnails for easy identification.

title: Does the app support night mode?
content: Yes, night mode reduces eye strain by using a dark background for comfortable reading in low-light conditions.

title: Can I zoom into PPTX pages?
content: Yes, you can use pinch-to-zoom or double-tap zoom to adjust the zoom level easily.

title: How do I jump to a specific page?
content: Use the 'Go to page' option to instantly navigate to any page number within the document.

title: Does the app show thumbnails of pages?
content: Yes, you can browse page thumbnails for quick navigation and better overview of the document.

title: Can I share PPTX files from the app?
content: Yes, you can easily share PPTX files with other apps directly from the viewer.

title: Does the app support printing?
content: Yes, you can print PPTX files using supported Android printing services.

title: What is margin crop?
content: Margin crop removes unnecessary white borders around pages to improve readability and maximize screen space.

title: Does the app work offline?
content: Yes, once files are available on your device, you can read them without an internet connection.

title: How does recent files work?
content: The app automatically saves recently opened files with thumbnails and allows you to quickly access them anytime.

title: Can I remove files from recent list?
content: Yes, you can remove any file from the recent list with a confirmation option.

title: Does the app support large PPTX files?
content: Yes, the app uses optimized rendering and lazy loading to handle large PPTX files smoothly.

title: What devices are supported?
content: The app supports Android devices running Android 7.0 and above, including phones and tablets.

title: Is there a free version of the app?
content: Yes, the app includes a free version with core features. A subscription unlocks full document access and premium features.

title: Can I open PPTXs from external apps?
content: Yes, the app supports opening PPTXs from file managers, email apps, and other external sources.

title: Does the app support multi-column documents?
content: Yes, the app includes basic multi-column reading detection for better read aloud performance.

title: Can I control playback from outside the app?
content: Yes, media session support allows playback controls from notifications or external devices.

title: Is my data secure?
content: Yes, your documents are stored locally on your device. The app does not upload your files unless you explicitly share them.
